name: 60W/80W/100W/120W – Traditional LED Wall Pack Light – Photocell Included
description: This High Voltage (277-480VAC) Traditional LED Wall Pack Light delivers 135LM/W bright and energy-efficient lighting that replaces traditional HPS/HID bulbs . Our wall pack lights are UL, and DLC 5.1 qualified, ensuring top-notch quality. The fixture has a built-in photocell sensor that automatically adjusts its illumination based on ambient light levels . Its wattage adjustable feature allows you to switch the wattages (60W/80W/100W/120W) according to your requirements. The Stripe Glass diffuser enhances light distribution, minimizing glare and providing a pleasant lighting experience. The heavy-duty die-cast aluminum body ensures IP 65 rating that can work in all outdoor environments. Our SWP5 Wall Pack Lighting lasts over 50,000 hours and has a 5-year warranty.
short_desc: Specifications: Certifications: UL, DLC IP Rating: IP65 Wattage: 120W / 100W / 80W (Selectable) Lumens: 16,500 LM (at 120W) Efficacy: 135 LM/W Color Temperature (CCT): 5000K Sensor: Built-in Photocell CRI: >80 Input Voltage: 277–480V Material: Die-cast Aluminum LED Type: SMD 2835 LED Count: 286 pcs Fixture Color: Bronze Lifespan: 50,000 Hours Power Factor: ≥0.9 Dimensions: 14.2″ x 8.6″ x 6.5″ Weight: 7.5 lbs Warranty: 5 Years Dimming: 0–10V
